title: PhpStorm freezes with Copilot
author: Erick Mendelski
text:
In recent months, PhpStorm has shown freezes whenever Copilot is active and suggests some code, especially if I type something different from what is suggested.
Anyone has seen something like this? Any suggestion?
Specs:
- Win 11
- Intel i7 13º
- RTX 4050
- 16GB DDR5
Per hour, I uninstall Copilot plugin.
